title: Marshallocereus aragonii
taxonomy: Marshallocereus aragonii is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Marshallocereus, which is a group of columnar cacti. The family Cactaceae is a large group of flowering plants that are native to the Americas. Marshallocereus aragonii is likely to be closely related to other species in the same genus and family. The classification of Marshallocereus aragonii is based on its physical characteristics, such as its columnar shape and areoles.
